message:
refactor(fcp-testkit): use AtomicBool for persist tracking in FakeStreamingSession

The persist() method takes &self (per StreamingSession trait), but the
previous implementation couldn't actually track the call since fields
weren't interior-mutable. This fix:

- Changed persist_called from bool to AtomicBool for interior mutability
- persist() now stores true via Ordering::Relaxed
- restore() now sets restore_called = true (was a no-op comment)
- Added accessor methods: persist_called() and restore_called()
- New test: fake_streaming_session_persist_restore_tracking validates
  both flags are initially false and become true after respective calls

This enables tests to verify connector persistence behavior is invoked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
